apply.dedupHint: ⚠ For identical INI fields, the preset applied last wins
apply.saveFirst: Current edits are unsaved — save before applying

editor.emptyHint:
Nothing selected — pick a preset or group on the left to edit, or create a new one.

▸ New preset: "+ New preset" (Ctrl+N) → name on Basic → add INI / file / image edits → 💾 Save (Ctrl+S).
▸ Groups & nesting: Ctrl+G creates a group; drag a preset into a group, drag a group into another to nest. Ctrl+Shift+G creates a checkbox-group table.
▸ Checkbox-group table: each row's label is a plain sub-group's name; a row's options are the presets (or nested checkbox-groups) you pick one from per row.
▸ Editor shortcuts: Ctrl+N new, Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V copy/paste selected actions, Ctrl+Shift+C duplicate item, 1-4 switch tabs, Esc deselect.

Edit mode builds presets; Use mode (✏️ / Ctrl+E) selects and applies them.

preset.noActionsClipboard: No actions copied yet (Ctrl+C in edit mode to copy)
preset.noActionsToCopy: Nothing to copy — this item has no actions
preset.cannotPasteHere: Can't paste actions into a plain group
preset.deleteConfirm: Delete {count} preset(s)? This cannot be undone.
preset.deletePresetConfirm: Delete preset "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

activation.title: Activation bindings
activation.dropHere: Drag a target option here (Shift = disable only)
activation.bindFailed: Can only bind to a different top-level row or a descendant
activation.rowMutexFailed: A row can't mix activation and disable bindings

group.movedOut: Moved {count} preset(s) to the root level
group.movedToRoot: Moved group to the root level
group.cannotMoveIntoChild: A parent group cannot be moved into its own child group
group.deleteZone: Drag a group or preset here to delete
group.createdWithPresets: Created group "{name}" and moved {count} preset(s) in
group.flattenConfirm: This group has nested sub-groups, but multi-select groups only allow one level. Force-merge? All presets from sub-groups will be flattened to the top level of this group.
group.cannotNestInTableRow: Rows inside a multi-select group can't contain plain sub-groups

ini.heading: skin.ini edits
ini.desc: Select and edit skin.ini fields, Mania fields require a key count first.
ini.deleteZone: Drag an action here to delete
ini.invalidKey: "{key}" is not a valid key name
ini.selectDeleteTarget: Select a section and key to delete
ini.enterManiaKeys: Enter the Mania key count first (e.g. 4, 7)
ini.opExists: This action already exists; cannot add a duplicate
ini.delOpExists: This delete action already exists; cannot add a duplicate
ini.empty: No edits yet — add one above
ini.resrcGroupTitle: Re-pick the group's source image (regenerates members by index)
ini.resrcNotFrame: The picked file is not an animation frame; can't regenerate by index
ini.centerPrompt: Confirm the values for centering. Existing values are read-only. Track fields accept a comma list or a single value (applied to every track); you may adjust the aspect ratio:

file.heading: File moves
file.desc: Pick replacement files and set their destination path (inside the skin folder), or mark files for deletion.
file.deleteZone: Drag an action here to delete
file.colExactTitle:
Off - if @2x is missing, fall back to the non-@2x file
On - if @2x is missing, skip
file.fillAllTitle: Copy the first member's destination and exact-match state to all members of the group
file.empty: No file actions yet — add one above
file.outsideSkin: Only files inside the skin folder can be selected
file.destOutsideSkin: This path is outside the skin folder!
file.colDestTitle:
You may specify the target path filename
Trailing / = folder name, otherwise a filename
A missing filename uses the source name

tint.heading: Image edit
tint.desc: Recolor PNG images, or adjust Percy LN.
tint.empty: No image operations yet — add one above
tint.colExactTitle:
Off - if @2x is missing, fall back to the non-@2x file
On - if @2x is missing, skip
tint.deleteZone: Drag an action here to delete
tint.colDestTitle:
You may specify the target path filename
Trailing / = folder name, otherwise a filename
A missing filename uses the source name

preview.heading: Preview image
